description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 27, 2025 at 10:03 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Inglewood, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on La Cienega Boulevard at W 83rd Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound on La Cienega Boulevard and came to a stop in a queue of traffic for a red light at the 
intersection at W Florence Avenue. As the light remained red and the Waymo AV remained stopped, a passenger car approached the 
Waymo AV from behind and the front of the passenger car made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The passenger car sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
